testcase.name: source file survives a deliberately slow content validation path
always fails with a stable message for ExecForge AI failure analysis
testcase.failure: Intentional failure: verify junit-results.xml failure messages reach the dashboard1 !== 2

testcase.name: page.tsx content sometimes fails random validation
layout.tsx content sometimes fails due to timing-dependent state
